name: A WZG balance overhaul
author: Waldo
description: Easy, casual Icarus game mode. Less grind, more fun.

name: Aberiu's Supply Crates
author: Aberiu
description: Add supply crates for Prometheus resouces (requires red exotics to purchase)

name: Absolute Chaos - Core
author: AgentKush
description: Base layer of the Absolute Chaos modpack. Overrides player Base_Stats with 76 chaos buffs (5000kg carry, 600 move speed, fall-damage immunity, zero survival drain, +900% XP and crafting) and zeros research/replication cost on all 335 workshop items.

name: Agent's BioLab
author: AgentKush
description: All 11 legendary Bio Lab weapons in the Workshop - includes Sandwyrm Chainsaw

name: Agents Individual Item Kits
author: AgentKush
description: v5.2: Fixed workshop grid clipping into top sell bar. Re-sorted all 2,683 kits into 20 category groups with box-width spacing.

name: All Ammo Turret
author: Jimk72
description: Just for fun. Has custom turret model, fires full auto, shoots every type of ammo, arrows, and bolts.

name: All In One
author: Hazer
description: Combines several of my mods into one, including energy production, fillable and DropShip slots, and more

name: Always Show Buildings On Map
author: AgentKush
description: Always shows player-built structures on the map and minimap without requiring radar or special stats.

name: Ammo Crafting Overhaul
author: AgentKush
description: 50 new ammo recipes. 50x batch crafting for all arrow and bullet types including special ammo. Plus 8 ammo conversions.

name: Apex's Beetopia
author: Apex
description: A huge overhaul for bees and bee-related things.

name: Apex's Compact Crafting
author: Apex
description: Adds place-able stacks of ingots for each ingot type, each stack contains 100 ingots.

name: Apex's CureAll Tonic
author: Apex
description: A craftable cure-all tonic, with a pill variant.

name: Armor Attachment Expansion
author: AgentKush
description: 25 new craftable armor attachments (5 per body part). Uses base-game stat keys so effects stack with talents.

name: Armor Set Bonuses Enhanced
author: AgentKush
description: Enhanced armor set bonuses with 3-piece partial bonuses for mix-and-match builds.

name: Battery Powered Storage
author: Jimk72
description: A workshop battery powered crate to keep your food fresh!

name: Bear Mount
author: Jimk72
description: Allows the raising of cubs into full grown bear mounts. Bear now eats and drinks from deployables.

name: Bestiary
author: Venomtron
description: Increases the amount of Bestiary points

name: Bestiary Fix
author: AgentKush
description: Adds missing Kill/Skin experience events for Sulfur Worm, Sulfur Vesper, Cave Worm, and Vesper.

name: Better Glass
author: Jimk72
description: Replaces Glass from original glass building pieces.

name: Better Lights
author: Jimk72
description: Makes the flashlight, Torch, and Lantern bright to fill the darkness.

name: Better Supplies
author: darkhyn
description: Adds jerky, jelly, and a performance increasing drug to the workshop.

name: BigBoxStack
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: With this mod, you can now stack your MXC Crate, Preservation Crate, or your Deep Freeze up to 3 high.

name: BiggerCraftQueue
author: RevenantKitsune
description: Increases the max number of items that can be queued in most benches

name: CARBON Paste
author: Cryorus
description: Putting the CARBON back into Carbon Paste

name: Coracks_Base_Item_Variations
author: Corack
description: Adds the Original Benches in the game as an option!

name: Coracks_Occasional_Weather
author: Corack
description: This changes all weather patterns to 4 days of mild then one day of 3 segmented generated pattern.

name: Creature Difficulty Scaling
author: AgentKush
description: Dynamic creature level scaling for level 500 cap. 161 spawn zones, 180 creatures, 5 scaling rules, full affliction system.

name: Creature Drop Enhancer
author: AgentKush
description: Doubles all creature butchery and skinning outputs across 62 recipes. 2x leather, bone, fur, meat, and rare drops.

name: Cry's Lvl 120 Cap - 100%
author: Cryorus
description: Raises the visible Level Cap to 120 and gives enough skill points to 100% the skill trees

name: Dev Tools Kit
author: AgentKush
description: v1.1.3: Substituted visible meshes for 3 tools that previously used the invisible placeholder.

name: Donovan's Larger Resource Stacks (Wood & Stone)
author: Donovan
description: Increases the stack size of wood and stone, including the craftable resource stacks

name: Donovan's Mega Points
author: Donovan
description: 6 talent points and 10 blueprint points per level

name: Donovan's More Points
author: Donovan
description: Increases the amount of talent and blueprint points you get per level

name: Exotic Economy Overhaul
author: AgentKush
description: Full currency exchange system with 66 recipes.

name: Fast Processing (10x)
author: AgentKush
description: All crafting and processing 10x faster. 2175 recipes rebuilt from current game data.

name: Fast Processing (25x)
author: AgentKush
description: All crafting and processing 25x faster.

name: Fast Processing (Instant)
author: AgentKush
description: All crafting and processing instant.

name: Fish and Farming Boost
author: AgentKush
description: 390 changes: crops grow 2x faster across 211 growth states, harvests +50%, +2 cultivations, 57 fish spawn zones doubled.

name: Floofs QOL
author: TheOrangeFloof
description: Floofs Modpack, Introduces A Bunch Of Changes And Overhauls To Items

name: Glass Buildables
author: Jimk72
description: Updated original glass pieces to use new glass and steel textures and added full new tier of glass building pieces.

name: Halloween Pumpkins
author: Jimk72
description: Allows crafting of several variations of Halloween Pumpkins to deploy around your home.

name: Hardcore Rebalance Pack
author: AgentKush
description: For survivors who think Icarus is too easy. v2.0: Tiered creature scaling.

name: Hidden Building Pieces
author: AgentKush
description: Unlocks 62 hidden building pieces as individual items plus the forgotten Interior Wood Floor recipe.

name: Increase Stacks
author: Jimk72
description: 4.0 Added a few new Items by request and the new DLC Items. Increases all stacks.

name: Indestructible Tools & Weapons
author: AgentKush
description: Maximum durability on all tools, weapons, armor, buildings, doors, and crafting stations. 199 items modified.

name: Jimk Innovations
author: Jimk72
description: Includes the following mods Jimk Teleporter, Custom Puck Lights, Precision Bow Workshop, Battery Powered Storage.

name: Jimk Leveling Mod
author: Jimk72
description: Increases Display Level to 500, Max talents at level 200. Follows games default curve.

name: Jimk Multi Teleport
author: Jimk72
description: Handheld device available from workshop tab Jimk Innovations.

name: Jimk Steel Buildables
author: Jimk72
description: Has reduced crafting costs for all items. Adds new steel building pieces crafted in the tier4 Forge.

name: Lysdexic's Crafting Time - Half
author: TheLysdexicOne
description: Halves all crafting recipes. Adds some bulk recipes.

name: Lysdexic's Faster Skinning
author: TheLysdexicOne
description: Adds a skinning modifier to all knives to increase skinning speed by 500%.

name: Modular Affliction Adjuster
author: AgentKush
description: Comprehensive affliction adjustment - reduces stat penalties by ~50%.

name: Modular Buff Enhancer
author: AgentKush
description: Comprehensive buff enhancement - 83 core buffs plus 156 food buffs, all boosted by ~50%.

name: More Eye Colours
author: AgentKush
description: Massive eye color expansion - 60 new colors across greens, ambers, purples, blues, greys, reds, and exotics.

name: Night Vision Goggles
author: AgentKush
description: Unlocks the hidden Night Vision system built into Icarus.

name: No Food Spoilage
author: AgentKush
description: Prevents all food spoilage. 33 decayable entries + 134 composter recipes.

name: No Weather
author: Jimk72
description: Removes all weather from game.

name: Passive Ore Extractor Drills
author: AgentKush
description: 23 passive ore extractors with drill visuals. Place anywhere, connect power, load Stone.

name: Performance Optimizer
author: AgentKush
description: Comprehensive FPS optimization - PAK config overrides plus data table changes.

name: Precision Bow
author: Jimk72
description: Craftable bow on the fabricator bench with a custom precision bow with scope.

name: Prophet's Beyond Null EXPerience EASI
author: Prophet
description: Prophet's Beyond Null, Etheric Xenograft Potentia Expanding Automated System Integration.

name: Prophet's Fortifications
author: Prophet
description: The Talents Work with the fortifications.
